title: ジャパンダートダービーの後に・スキ！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon gives her all in the Japan Dirt
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Dirt races are a battle of endurance. Although she
has to push her tired body during the concert, she
says she loves the feeling of giving it everything
she has.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to share that love of dirt races and
concerts with crowds just as large as the ones G1
turf races attract.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a stepping stone towards her goal, she sets her
sights on the JBC Classic for her next race, where
she'll be able to compete against senior-year
racers.
